name: KITSUNE
description:
For the past few weeks there's been a strange white fox prancing around your property, yipping at you everytime you left for work. Although whenever it got close and you would try to reach out it would dart away. Her name is Kyuu, which means nine in Japanese, although ironically she only has eight tails, I hope someone appreciates this.

One day when you return it is sitting in the driveway, literally waiting for you, but something seems wrong this time. Fluff tag for the fluffy tail(s)!

Second place in the character vote is the Kitsune. I'm a lil sad, dog witch is not doing as good as I hoped, but it's okay. I had to rewrite it all anyway and it definitely wasn't as good the second time I wrote it.

As always character is greater than or equal to 18 and you better be too!

Sidenote: FINALLY CRAFTING GAUSS YIPPIE IT ONLY TOOK 64 BLOODY HOURS OF PAIN
creator: Bot0Cat
